creator: peter@flytrace.com
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #65)
To remove:
devel/efl/files/patch-src_lib_evas_common_evas__cpu.c
devel/efl/files/
x11-wm/enlightenment/files/pkg-message.in
x11-wm/enlightenment/files/
x11-wm/enlightenment/Makefile.plist

I've just fixed enlightenment build on i386/arm:
https://github.com/Peter2121/freebsd-ports/commit/e98fa462c3cb3f4378eed397b6bbeda63615b4a0

Could you take the patch from GitHub, please?

I'm really new in SVN (I use GIT normally), so it was probably my fault.

I've just received the notification about failed build of EFL on i386, but I cannot reproduce the problem, it builds correctly on i386 for me. I'm going to investigate the problem.
